artPrompt: A lumbering mutant goblin fused with the rusted frame of a vending cart, murky-green flesh bulging through its dented panels glowing with sickly bioluminescence, a pleading hungry expression on its half-snack face, bubbling toxic runoff and drifting litter around its wheels under a bruised stormy sky, grotesque yet tender in the murky light, rendered as soft pastel impressionism — hazy diffuse light, visible chalky texture, gentle gradients, dreamy muted color.
name: Snack Cart Mutant
text:
Whenever there is a snack on the table at the beginning of your upkeep, Snack Cart Mutant gets +2/+0 until end of turn. If there is no snack, it gets sad and demands one out loud.
{R}: Snack Cart Mutant gains haste until end of turn.
flavorText: It used to sell the snacks. Now it is mostly snack.
